svg.aria-label: Pilot for macOS: a sidebar of workspaces beside split panes — a terminal showing a code diff and an agent run, a browser with a live price chart, a dev-server terminal, and a GitHub Actions activity feed.

g.text: /// Apply pending LP delta to VaultState
Now the big task — updating all ~25 instruction
files. Reading them in batches and editing each.
Grepping for refs to validator_identity to find
exactly which files still need changes.
28 files to update — the labor-intensive part.
Running 3 agents in parallel over the batches.
Update Rust unit tests and helpers
bypass permissions on · esc to interrupt
